rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption affects school district property tax calculations. Software standards under §39.086 must be updated to ensure financial accounting software accommodates the new $200,000 exemption amount.
quote: Standards adopted under this section must ensure that the software will enable a school district to share and report information in a timely manner for purposes of financial management, operational decision-making, and transparency of district operations to the public.
_note: Indirect conflict: school district financial accounting software must be updated to reflect changed exemption; rulemaking update needed for interoperability standards.
